title: Loopi: The Open-Source Powerhouse Automating Your Entire Desktop (and Beyond!)
article: Have you ever wished you could automate those repetitive tasks on your computer, not just in the browser, but across all your applications, with a dash of AI smarts, all while keeping your data local? If so, get ready to meet your new best friend: Loopi. This incredible open-source project is a game-changer for anyone looking to streamline their workflow and build powerful automations without breaking a sweat or sending their sensitive data to the cloud. Loopi is essentially a desktop automation platform that lets you build complex workflows visually, using a super intuitive drag-and-drop editor. Imagine crafting a sequence of actions that can navigate websites, interact with any application on your desktop, run shell commands, and even tap into over 80 popular API integrations like Slack, Discord, GitHub, and Notion. It's like having a universal remote for your entire computer, capable of orchestrating tasks that span across different environments seamlessly. One of Loopi's standout features is its comprehensive control over your desktop. Unlike many browser-only automation tools, Loopi can move your mouse, click, drag, scroll, type text, and execute hotkey combinations anywhere on your screen. This means you can automate interactions with legacy software, desktop apps, or any part of your OS that a browser can't reach. Coupled with its real browser automation capabilities, you can build truly end-to-end processes, from logging into a web portal to processing data in a local spreadsheet. But Loopi doesn't stop there. It integrates powerful AI agents that can truly elevate your automations. These aren't just simple scripts; they're goal-driven agents that can run your workflows on a schedule, reflect on their performance, and even self-patch broken workflows. The best part? You have the flexibility to connect various Large Language Models (LLMs), including OpenAI and Anthropic for cloud-based power, or — and this is huge for privacy and cost — use local models like Ollama, Claude Code, Llama, and Mistral. This means you can create intelligent automation pipelines without ever sending your data off your machine, giving you unparalleled control and security. For developers, Loopi is a treasure trove. It empowers you to build sophisticated solutions for system administration, data extraction, testing, and much more, all without getting bogged down in intricate code for every step. The CLI support also means you can integrate Loopi workflows into your existing development pipelines, running and managing automations directly from your terminal. Whether you're looking to automate mundane tasks, build intelligent data processing agents, or just explore the cutting edge of local-first AI, Loopi offers a robust, open-source platform that's both powerful and incredibly accessible. It truly lets you focus on the logic, not the boilerplate.
key_takeaways: Loopi provides comprehensive desktop, browser, and system command automation through a visual workflow builder.
It integrates powerful AI agents, supporting both cloud and local LLMs (like Ollama), prioritizing privacy and control.
Developers can build end-to-end, agentic workflows, connecting AI to real-world actions and 80+ APIs.
It's an open-source, local-first platform offering versatility and robust control over your entire computer.
CLI support allows seamless integration into existing development and DevOps pipelines.
readme_summary: Loopi is an open-source desktop automation platform that allows users to build and run complex workflows locally. It offers visual workflow building, real browser automation, desktop control, system command execution, AI agent integration, and over 80 API integrations.
description: A desktop automation platform — control browsers, system cursor/keyboard, run shell commands, and orchestrate workflows with AI agents and 80+ integrations. Runs locally.
